text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm just thinking about what to send to my
parents next.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Last time I got them tickets to a kabuki play that
resembled their first meeting...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
And before that, I made some amazake with my
mother's recipe. At least, I think that was it...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever. I'll just pick something that jumps
out at me, like I always do.
